name: Reliance Industrial Infrastructure Limited
summary: Reliance Industrial Infrastructure Limited engages in setting up/operating industrial infrastructure in India. The company is involved in the transportation of petroleum products and raw water through its pipelines; hire of construction machinery; and provision of other infrastructure support services, as well as leasing and providing services connected with computer software and data processing. It primarily operates in Mumbai and the Rasayani regions of Maharashtra, as well as Surat and Jamnagar belts of Gujarat. The company was formerly known as CPPL Limited and changed its name to Reliance Industrial Infrastructure Limited in March 1994. Reliance Industrial Infrastructure Limited was incorporated in 1988 and is based in Mumbai, India.
